Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Cody Purtell at HK52.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Cody Purtell
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Cody Purtell

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Cody Purtell
Out of the Cage - Cody Purtell
Out of the Cage - Cody Purtell

Video.summary: Justin Basra takes on Jacob Smith at HK51. Justin comes with a tough wrestling background and ends with some lower back tightness. Cam MacDonald fights Sean Michaels and ends with a Tap Out! Cam had a hard weight cut and see how that impacts his fight against Sean Michaels.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra
Video.title: After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra

Image.alt: After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra
After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra
After The Fight - HK51 Cam Macdonald/Justin Basra

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

Video.summary: Jacob Smith is a star when it comes to Brazilian Jiu Jitsu but will it be enough for Justin Basra? It ends with a TKO and a "smashed up" foot. Two Southpaws - Miles Anstead takes on Adrian Miles and it ends with a tap out!
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - HK51 Jacob Smith/Miles Anstead
Video.title: After The Fight - HK51 Jacob Smith/Miles Anstead

Image.alt: After The Fight - HK51 Jacob Smith/Miles Anstead

Video.summary: Tara LaRosa is a former student of all-world fighter Royce Gracie. She takes on perhaps the only woman who has a fighting chance to put the hurt on her…Amanda Buckner.
